blanket_rent_reduction.description: If private rents were 10% lower, how would government housing benefit spending and tenant incomes change?

published_comparison.description: No published microsimulation estimates exist for blanket private rent reductions.

lha_unfreeze.description: Unfreezing Local Housing Allowance rates to the 30th percentile of market rents.

published_comparison.description: Unfreezing LHA to 30th percentile of market rents.

sar_abolition.description: Abolishing the Shared Accommodation Rate so all single adults get full LHA from age 18.

published_comparison.description: Abolishing or lowering the Shared Accommodation Rate age threshold.

social_rent_cap.description: A 5% cap on council and housing association rents.

published_comparison.description: Tighter caps on council and housing association rents.

rent_control_cpi.description: If private rent increases had been capped at CPI+1% per year, rents today would be lower than market levels. Each scenario shows the effect after the cap has been in place long enough for rents to fall 5%, 10%, or 15% below current market rates.

published_comparison.description: Published estimates of per-household savings from rent caps or freezes.

estimates.metric: Tenant saving from CPI cap (vs market rents since 2015)
